## File Access Policy

> AUTO-GENERATED — edit `ai-policy.yml` and run `npm run sync:ai-policy`

### Hard Ignore — never read these paths

- `.git/`
- `.github/skills/`
- `node_modules/`
- `build/`
- `vendor/wp-coding-standards/`
- `vendor/dealerdirect/`
- `vendor/phpunit/`
- `vendor/composer/`
- `vendor/bin/`
- `vendor/autoload_packages.php`
- `vendor/autoload_packages.php`
- `package-lock.json`
- `composer.lock`
- `languages/`
- `tests/_output/`
- `coverage/`
- `tmp/`
- `logs/`
- `**/*.log`
- `.DS_Store`
- `Thumbs.db`

### Requires Permission — ask before reading

Before reading any path below, ask:
> "May I read `<path>` to help with this task?"

- `vendor/automattic/`
